default.title: Fast, Reliable & Honest Repair Service
default.description: Our experienced technicians handle all brands and models. We diagnose accurately, quote transparently, and repair quickly — usually same day for most issues.
default.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a mobile repair service...

services.name: Mobile Repair
services.title: Mobile Repair
services.description: Professional repair services for all hardware issues including charging port fixes, battery replacements, microphone repairs, speaker changes, and motherboard issues. We use premium replacement parts and offer warranty.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a mobile repair service...

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.title: Screen Replacement
services.description: High-quality screen replacements for all smartphone brands. We resolve issues like cracked glass, unresponsive touch screens, black screens, or display bleeding. Includes a free tempered glass!
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a screen replacement service...

services.name: Tempered Glass Replacement
services.title: Tempered Glass Replacement
services.description: Premium 9H hardness tempered glass installation to protect your display from drops and scratches. We ensure bubble-free application with precise fit for all models.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a tempered glass replacement...

services.name: Software Flashing & Change
services.title: Software Flashing & Change
services.description: Fix bootloops, system lag, and software errors with official firmware flashing. We also assist with OS updates, data backup, and resolving software glitches.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a software flashing service...

services.name: Mobile Unlocking
services.title: Mobile Unlocking
services.description: Safe and secure mobile unlocking for pattern, PIN, password, or network/carrier locks. Get access to your phone or use it with any carrier worldwide.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I need a mobile unlocking service...

services.name: New SIM Card Activation
services.title: New SIM Card Activation
services.description: Get a new prepaid or postpaid SIM card activated instantly. We support Airtel, Jio, and Vi with quick Aadhaar-based digital KYC process.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I want to activate a new SIM card...

services.name: SIM Operator Change
services.title: SIM Operator Change
services.description: Switch your current mobile operator to Airtel, Jio, or Vi without changing your mobile number. Benefit from exciting port-in offers and high-speed data plans.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I want to port my SIM to another operator...

services.name: Sundirect DTH Recharge
services.title: Sundirect DTH Recharge
services.description: Quick and hassle-free Sundirect DTH recharging services. Renew your monthly packs, add channels, or upgrade packages instantly in-store or via WhatsApp.
services.waMessage: Hello King Mobiles, I want to recharge my Sundirect DTH...
